commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Chrome MCP session caching so caller aborts are tracked per waiter while shared pending attaches use their own lifecycle, with regression tests for mixed waiter abort and close races.

PR surface: Source +124, Tests +243. Total +367 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main shares a cached pending attach promise created with the first caller's AbortSignal, and the linked issue gives a concrete gated-session reproduction shape. I did not run the repro locally because this review was read-only.
